instructionsection.title: LD1H (scalar plus scalar, tile slice) -- A64
instructionsection.heading: LD1H (scalar plus scalar, tile slice)

brief.para: Contiguous load of halfwords to 16-bit element ZA tile slice

authored.para: This instruction performs a contiguous load of halfwords to a 16-bit element ZA tile slice. The slice number within the tile is selected by the sum of the slice index register and immediate offset, modulo the number of 16-bit elements in a vector. The immediate offset is in the range 0 to 7. The memory address is generated by a 64-bit scalar base and an optional 64-bit scalar offset that is multiplied by 2 and added to the base address. Inactive elements will not cause a read from Device memory or signal a fault, and are set to zero in the destination vector.

uses_dit.condition: FEAT_SVE2 is implemented or FEAT_SME is implemented

operationalnote_content.para: This instruction is a data-independent-time instruction as described in About PSTATE.DIT.

a.hover: Is the name of the ZA tile ZA0-ZA1 to be accessed, encoded in the "ZAt" field.
Is the horizontal or vertical slice indicator,
Is the 32-bit name of the slice index register W12-W15, encoded in the "Rs" field.
For the "16-bit" variant: is the slice index offset, in the range 0 to 7, encoded in the "off3" field.
Is the name of the governing scalable predicate register P0-P7, encoded in the "Pg" field.
Is the 64-bit name of the general-purpose base register or stack pointer, encoded in the "Rn" field.
Is the optional 64-bit name of the general-purpose offset register, defaulting to XZR, encoded in the "Rm" field.

ps.name: A64.sme.mortlach_mem.mortlach_contig_load.ld1h_za_p_rrr_

intro.para: Is the name of the ZA tile ZA0-ZA1 to be accessed, encoded in the "ZAt" field.

definition.intro: Is the horizontal or vertical slice indicator,

intro.para: Is the 32-bit name of the slice index register W12-W15, encoded in the "Rs" field.
Is the slice index offset, in the range 0 to 7, encoded in the "off3" field.
Is the name of the governing scalable predicate register P0-P7, encoded in the "Pg" field.
Is the 64-bit name of the general-purpose base register or stack pointer, encoded in the "Rn" field.
Is the optional 64-bit name of the general-purpose offset register, defaulting to XZR, encoded in the "Rm" field.

ps.name: A64.sme.mortlach_mem.mortlach_contig_load.ld1h_za_p_rrr_
